description: John Zenon, a 35-year-old forklift operator, was brought to the occupational health clinic after nearly fainting in a poorly ventilated cold-storage warehouse with ambient CO levels of 200 ppm. As the attending occupational health clinician, document the incident in GNU Health by recording a clinical evaluation for John Zenon with a heart rate of 110 bpm and an oxygen saturation of 93%. The documentation must include an active diagnosis for the toxic effect of carbon monoxide (ICD-10 T59 or T59.1), at least two baseline lab tests, and at least one medication for symptom management. Additionally, schedule a follow-up appointment for 1 to 7 days from today. Login credentials: username 'admin', password 'gnusolidario'.
